seoTitle: Samyoung Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors Product Catalog | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Browse Samyoung aluminum electrolytic capacitors, radial lead, snap-in, and screw terminal capacitors. Technical specifications, selection guide, and alternative parts.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Samyoung capacitor for my application?
faqs.answer: Consider voltage rating, capacitance value, ripple current requirements, temperature range, and lifetime requirements. Samyoung offers comprehensive selection guides for each product series.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your application specifications for personalized Samyoung capacitor selection assistance.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Samyoung's radial and snap-in capacitors?
faqs.answer: Radial capacitors have wire leads for through-hole mounting and are suitable for lower power applications. Snap-in capacitors have PCB mounting terminals, higher capacitance values, and are designed for high-power applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use radial capacitors for consumer electronics and low-power applications. Use snap-in capacitors for power supplies above 100W.

faqs.question: What are Samyoung's screw terminal capacitors used for?
faqs.answer: Screw terminal capacitors are designed for high-power applications requiring large capacitance values and high ripple current capability. Common applications include inverters, welding equipment, and UPS systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications above 500W or requiring capacitance above 10,000uF, consider screw terminal capacitors.

faqs.question: Are Samyoung capacitors RoHS compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Samyoung capacitors are RoHS compliant and free from lead, mercury, cadmium, and other restricted substances.
faqs.decisionGuide: For RoHS compliance documentation, contact our sales team with your specific part numbers.

faqs.question: What is the lead time for Samyoung capacitors?
faqs.answer: Standard Samyoung capacitors typically have 6-8 weeks lead time from Korea. High-volume or custom specifications may require 10-12 weeks.
faqs.decisionGuide: For urgent requirements, check our stock availability or discuss scheduled orders with our sales team.

categories.name: Radial Lead Capacitors
categories.description: Standard radial aluminum electrolytic capacitors for general-purpose applications
categories.longDescription: Samyoung radial lead capacitors are high-reliability aluminum electrolytic capacitors designed for industrial and consumer applications. These capacitors feature wire leads for through-hole mounting and are available in a wide range of capacitance and voltage ratings. Ideal for power supplies, industrial controls, and consumer electronics where reliability is important. Contact BeiLuo Electronics, your authorized Samyoung distributor, for radial capacitor selection guidance.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on capacitance, voltage rating, size constraints, and lifetime requirements. SR series for standard, SH for high temperature, SL for low impedance.

faqs.question: What are the typical applications for Samyoung radial capacitors?
faqs.answer: Radial capacitors are used in consumer electronics, power supplies, audio equipment, and industrial controls. They are ideal for applications requiring compact size and reliable performance. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: For general-purpose applications with moderate capacitance requirements, radial capacitors offer excellent reliability.

faqs.question: What is the difference between SR, SH, and SL series?
faqs.answer: SR series is the standard radial capacitor for general applications. SH series offers higher temperature ratings and longer lifetime. SL series features low impedance for high-frequency applications. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use SR series for standard applications. Use SH series for high-temperature applications. Use SL series for switching power supplies.

faqs.question: What is the typical lifetime of Samyoung radial capacitors?
faqs.answer: Standard radial capacitors are rated for 2,000 to 10,000 hours at 85C or 105C. Lifetime can be extended significantly with proper derating. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: For extended lifetime, operate at lower temperatures and use voltage derating.

faqs.question: Can Samyoung radial capacitors be used in industrial applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Samyoung radial capacitors are widely used in industrial controls and power supplies. Select capacitors with appropriate lifetime ratings for your application. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: For industrial applications, select capacitors with 105C rating and extended lifetime.

faqs.question: What is the ripple current rating of Samyoung radial capacitors?
faqs.answer: Ripple current ratings range from 0.1A to 2.5A depending on capacitance, voltage, and case size. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select capacitors with ripple current ratings at least 1.5x your application requirements.

faqs.question: Are Samyoung radial capacitors available in low-profile versions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Samyoung offers low-profile radial capacitors with reduced height for space-constrained applications. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: For height-restricted applications, specify low-profile versions.

products.name: Radial Capacitor 1000uF 25V
products.shortDescription: Standard radial capacitor with 1000uF capacitance and 25V rating for general-purpose applications.
descriptionParagraphs: The SR-1000uF-25V is a standard radial aluminum electrolytic capacitor designed for general-purpose applications. With 1000uF capacitance and 25V rating, it provides reliable filtering and decoupling for low-voltage circuits.
This capacitor features a compact 10mm diameter case with 5mm lead spacing, making it ideal for space-constrained designs. The standard radial form factor enables easy through-hole mounting on PCBs.
Rated for 2000 hours at 85C, this capacitor is suitable for consumer electronics and industrial applications with standard lifetime requirements.
products.faeReview: The SR-1000uF-25V is an excellent choice for low-voltage filtering applications. The 1000uF/25V rating is perfect for 12V and 5V power supply output filtering. Samyoung's Korean manufacturing quality ensures reliable performance. The compact 10mm size fits in most designs, and the 5mm lead spacing is compatible with standard PCB layouts.

alternativeParts.comparison: Voltage: 25V same; Capacitance: 680uF vs 1000uF; Size: same
alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications where 680uF is sufficient

alternativeParts.comparison: Voltage: 25V same; Temperature: 105C vs 85C; Lifetime: 5000h vs 2000h

applicationScenarios.description: Output filtering for 5V DC power supply

faqs.question: What is the maximum ripple current for the SR-1000uF-25V?
faqs.answer: The rated ripple current is 1.2A at 85C and 120Hz. This rating ensures reliable operation in power supply applications with moderate switching frequencies. At lower temperatures, the capacitor can handle higher ripple currents - approximately 1.4A at 65C. For high-frequency applications above 100kHz, the effective ripple current capability may be reduced due to increased ESR. Always verify the actual operating temperature and frequency conditions in your application to ensure the capacitor operates within its safe operating area.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications exceeding 1.2A ripple current, consider using multiple capacitors in parallel or upgrading to a higher capacitance model. Contact our FAE team for thermal modeling and ripple current calculations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the expected lifetime of the SR-1000uF-25V at typical operating conditions?
faqs.answer: The rated lifetime is 2,000 hours at 85C. Using the Arrhenius equation, we can calculate the expected lifetime at different operating temperatures. At 65C, the expected lifetime extends to 8,000 hours. At 45C, lifetime increases to 32,000 hours. At 25C ambient, you can achieve up to 128,000 hours. Every 10C reduction in operating temperature approximately doubles the capacitor lifetime. These calculations assume voltage derating to 80% of rated voltage and ripple current within specifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For maximum capacitor lifetime, operate at the lowest practical temperature with 80% voltage derating. Contact our FAE team for lifetime calculations specific to your application conditions.

faqs.question: What voltage derating is recommended for reliable operation of the SR-1000uF-25V?
faqs.answer: Industry best practice recommends operating aluminum electrolytic capacitors at no more than 80% of their rated voltage. For this 25V rated capacitor, the maximum recommended operating voltage is 20V. This 20% derating significantly improves reliability and extends operational lifetime. For critical applications or high-temperature environments, 50% derating is recommended, limiting operating voltage to 13V. The voltage derating also provides margin for voltage transients and line regulation variations. Operating above 80% of rated voltage will significantly reduce capacitor lifetime.
faqs.decisionGuide: Design your circuit to operate the capacitor at 80% or less of rated voltage for optimal reliability. Contact our FAE team for voltage derating recommendations specific to your application requirements.

faqs.question: What is the operating temperature range of the SR-1000uF-25V and how does it affect performance?
faqs.answer: This capacitor is rated for operation from -40C to +85C. At the maximum rated temperature of 85C, the capacitor achieves its rated lifetime of 2,000 hours. As operating temperature decreases, capacitor lifetime increases exponentially following the Arrhenius relationship - approximately doubling for every 10C reduction. Capacitance and ESR also vary with temperature, with capacitance typically increasing 10-15% at low temperatures and decreasing slightly at high temperatures. ESR generally decreases as temperature increases, improving high-frequency performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: For extended capacitor lifetime, minimize operating temperature through proper thermal design and ventilation. Contact our FAE team for thermal management recommendations specific to your application.

faqs.question: What is the ESR of the SR-1000uF-25V and how does it affect circuit performance?
faqs.answer: The Equivalent Series Resistance (ESR) at 100Hz is approximately 0.02 Ohm. ESR represents the resistive losses in the capacitor and directly affects ripple voltage, power dissipation, and filtering effectiveness. Lower ESR results in lower ripple voltage for a given ripple current, reduced self-heating, and improved filtering at high frequencies. This capacitor's ESR characteristics make it suitable for switching power supplies and industrial controls. ESR typically decreases with increasing temperature and increases at higher frequencies. For switching power supplies operating at 100kHz, consider the frequency characteristics of ESR.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring lower ESR, consider our low-impedance series or connect multiple capacitors in parallel. Contact our FAE team for ESR optimization recommendations.

faqs.question: Can multiple SR-1000uF-25V capacitors be connected in parallel for increased capability?
faqs.answer: Yes, multiple capacitors can be connected in parallel to increase total capacitance and share ripple current. When connecting SR-1000uF-25V in parallel, the total capacitance adds linearly while ESR reduces proportionally. For example, two capacitors in parallel provide 2000uF capacitance and approximately 0.010 Ohm ESR (half the single capacitor ESR). This configuration also improves ripple current capability to 2.4A. Important considerations include: using identical part numbers for balanced current sharing, maintaining symmetrical PCB layout, ensuring adequate spacing for thermal management, and verifying the total inrush current doesn't exceed circuit limitations.
faqs.decisionGuide: For high-current applications, consider parallel connection of multiple capacitors. Contact our FAE team for parallel capacitor bank design assistance and current sharing analysis.

products.name: Radial Capacitor 470uF 50V
products.shortDescription: Standard radial capacitor with 470uF capacitance and 50V rating for medium-voltage applications.
descriptionParagraphs: The SR-470uF-50V is a standard radial aluminum electrolytic capacitor designed for medium-voltage applications. With 470uF capacitance and 50V rating, it provides reliable filtering for 24V and 48V power supply circuits.
This capacitor features a 10mm diameter case with standard 5mm lead spacing. The optimized electrode design provides good ripple current capability.
Rated for 2000 hours at 85C, this capacitor is suitable for industrial and consumer applications.
products.faeReview: The SR-470uF-50V is ideal for 24V industrial power supplies. The 470uF value provides good filtering for medium-power applications. I frequently recommend this part for PLC power supplies and industrial control systems. The 50V rating provides good margin for 24V systems.

alternativeParts.useCase: Use for applications where 330uF is sufficient

alternativeParts.reason: Higher temperature rating for industrial use

categories.name: Snap-in Capacitors
categories.description: Samyoung snap-in aluminum electrolytic capacitors for high-power applications. These capacitors feature high capacitance values, high ripple current capability, and long lifetime ratings for industrial power supplies and inverters.

selectionGuide.title: How to Select Samyoung Snap-in Capacitors
selectionGuide.description: Comprehensive guide for selecting snap-in capacitors for high-power applications

faqs.question: What are the advantages of snap-in capacitors over radial capacitors?
faqs.answer: Snap-in capacitors offer several advantages for high-power applications: (1) Higher capacitance values up to 100,000uF; (2) Higher ripple current capability, typically 5-20A; (3) Lower ESR for better filtering; (4) Snap-in terminals for secure PCB mounting; (5) Longer lifetime ratings, up to 15,000 hours. These features make snap-in capacitors ideal for industrial power supplies, motor drives, and inverter applications where high capacitance and high current handling are required.

categories.name: Screw Terminal Capacitors
categories.description: Samyoung screw terminal aluminum electrolytic capacitors for ultra-high-power applications. These capacitors feature the highest capacitance values and ripple current capability for large industrial systems.

selectionGuide.title: How to Select Samyoung Screw Terminal Capacitors
selectionGuide.description: Guide for selecting screw terminal capacitors for ultra-high-power applications

faqs.question: When should I use screw terminal capacitors?
faqs.answer: Use screw terminal capacitors when: (1) Capacitance requirements exceed 10,000uF; (2) Ripple current exceeds 10A; (3) Physical size allows for large can-type capacitors; (4) Mounting security is critical; (5) Application requires the highest reliability. Screw terminal capacitors are commonly used in large motor drives, wind turbines, solar inverters, and UPS systems.

selectionGuide.title: How to Select Samyoung High Temperature Capacitors
selectionGuide.description: Guide for selecting high temperature capacitors for automotive and military applications

faqs.question: What is the difference between 105°C, 125°C, and 150°C rated capacitors?
faqs.answer: The temperature rating indicates the maximum ambient temperature at which the capacitor can operate while achieving its rated lifetime. 105°C capacitors are standard for industrial applications. 125°C capacitors are used for high-temperature industrial and some automotive applications. 150°C capacitors are specifically designed for under-hood automotive applications. Higher temperature ratings typically come with higher cost but provide longer lifetime at any given operating temperature.

This capacitor features AEC-Q200 qualification, making it suitable for automotive electronics. The 125°C rating ensures reliable operation in high-temperature environments.
Rated for 5000 hours at 125°C, this capacitor delivers extended operational lifetime at high temperatures.
products.faeReview: The SH-1000uF-50V is excellent for automotive applications. The AEC-Q200 qualification and 125°C rating ensure reliable operation in demanding automotive environments.
